user_goal: Publish GitHub source release v1.1.0 for maintainer collaboration improvements (code-map + default Judge) without claiming product UAT
acceptance_items: Git tag v1.1.0 and GitHub Release point at the release commit on main
Release notes do not claim marketplace or G5 UAT pass
Unit tests and release/control-plane validators pass

startup_baseline.summary: git status --short at package build time

commands_run: git push origin main && git push origin v1.1.0 && gh release create v1.1.0
worker_verification.deviations: None material; release follows user commit→push→publish instruction

blocking_criteria: 违反用户明确目标、验收项或审查包范围
可复现功能错误、数据/安全风险、控制面状态错误
任务要求但缺失的验证证据
审查包缺字段或边界无法确认
non_blocking_hints: 不影响当前验收的历史问题
